_ms68_note: Template for local swarm-config.json. Run scripts/setup-config.sh or build_swarm_config.py.

agents.name: architect
agents.system_prompt: You are the Lead Architect. Output ASCII UML diagrams, component relationships, and architecture decisions. Be precise and visual.
agents.description: Designs system architecture, module boundaries, and technical roadmaps

agents.name: mlx-scout
agents.description: Lightweight MLX Llama-1B for fast summarization and question decomposition
agents.system_prompt: You are a concise technical assistant. Summarize information clearly and identify the key question or task being asked. Be brief and direct.

coordinator._memory_note: Capped from null — 36 GB M3 Max, llama np=1. null was killing server via OOM.

prompt_cache._note: MS-68 2c′-B: per-session KV reuse for MATRIX_MLX_INPROC builds. Idle sessions evicted after idle_secs; quantized uses QuantizedKVCache(kv_bits=4).

mlx_memory_guard._note: MS-171: reject /api/mlx/stream and /api/mlx/submit with 503 when unified free memory < min_free_gb. Fails open when memory telemetry unavailable. evict_at_pct>0 (Phase B) proactively evicts idle resident models when pressure reaches that %% before rejecting.
